pull.title: ci: enable musig module for native macOS arm64 job
pull.body: Seems like this is the only CI job where the musig module wasn't enabled (roughly checked via `$ git grep "SCHNORRSIG: 'yes',"`, to find lists where modules are enabled explicitly).
